_comment: Broad-crested weir reference case for Stage-1 3D validation gate.
Analytical reference follows the standard weir nappe formula:
Cd = 0.848 (broad-crested), b = 1.0 m (unit width), H = 0.30 m
Domain: 3 m long × 1 m wide × 0.6 m tall
Weir:   centred at x=1.5 m, height 0.20 m, crest length 0.30 m
ICs:    upstream depth 0.50 m (h = 0.50 m above channel floor),
BCs:    inlet: constant head (WSE = 0.50 m), outlet: free overfall
free_surface_upstream_m  : WSE at x=0.5 m in range [0.45, 0.55]
free_surface_downstream_m: WSE at x=2.5 m in range [0.05, 0.25]
discharge_m3_per_s       : mean column discharge at weir crest in range [0.165, 0.270]
NOTE: This case is a specification stub.  The run_and_compare harness will
instantiate a 3D patch matching this geometry when triggered by
BACKWATER_RUN_SWE3D_PHYSICS_CASES=1.  The case will fail gracefully
until VoF advection + pressure projection are implemented.
name: broad_crested_weir

free_surface_upstream_m.description: Water-surface elevation at x=0.5 m (upstream of weir)

free_surface_downstream_m.description: Water-surface elevation at x=2.5 m (downstream of weir)

discharge_m3_per_s.description: Volumetric discharge past weir crest (Q = Cd b H^1.5 sqrt(2g/3))
